description: This photograph depicts an agricultural area with natural vegetation located in Inandik, Anatolia, Turkey, captured on 2011-07-16. The scene shows numerous mature trees with open canopies, casting dappled shadows across a ground layer of dry, sparse grass and fallen leaves. The image visually exemplifies an agro-forestry land use management system, which integrates trees within agricultural settings. The image source is CNES 2011© Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image, originating from a SPOT-5 sensor at 2.5-metre resolution with a Near-Infrared/Red/Green (NIR/R/G) Band Combination.
